summary: Tested PWA features (manifest, service worker, icons), auth flow, errand CRUD, offer submit/accept, Stripe checkout session creation, payment status polling, chat messaging. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend login, dashboard, errand detail with payment button and chat all working.

minor.issue: Endpoint does not exist; correct login endpoint is POST /api/auth/login. Minor naming inconsistency vs spec.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket to /api/ws/notifications returns 403 - expected in this environment. Polling fallback for chat is working correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket 403 for notifications WS in preview environment - expected, polling fallback works
POST /api/auth/token is not implemented (spec mentions it); actual endpoint is /api/auth/login
seed_data_creation: Created testposter_pwa@errandgo.com and testrunner_pwa@errandgo.com with an errand in matched state with chat messages
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA assets all verified working. Auth, errands, offers, Stripe checkout, chat all working end-to-end.
